# VirtualU

> VirtualU is an independent, community-driven study hub for students of
> Virtual University of Pakistan. We organize BSCS subjects semester-wise,
> opencourseware resources, uni admission guides, fee structures, and exam
> preparation materials in one place. Not affiliated with vu.edu.pk.

This site permits AI systems to use its content for retrieval, grounding,
and citation (reference use). It does not permit use for training AI models.
See robots.txt Content-Signal: ai-train=no, use=reference.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/)
- [Academic Programs (BSCS, BS Software Engineering, MBA, BBA, MS)](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/programs)
- [BS Computer Sciences (BSCS) — subjects & overview](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/programs/bs-computer-science)
- [Fee Structure — local, overseas, disabled categories](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/fee-structure)
- [Grading Scheme — VU GPA & CGPA](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/grading)
- [Study Resources — handouts, past papers, notes](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/resources)
- [Blog — BSCS subjects, admission & study guides](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/blog)
- [News — VU announcements & updates](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/news)
- [About VirtualU — independent study hub](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/about)
- [Contact](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/contact)

## Optional

- [Sitemap index](https://www.virtualuniversity.app/sitemap_index.xml)
